title: Add filesystem protection for .tick in worktree agents
description: Implement defense-in-depth protection for child worktrees: sandbox mode auto/none/readonly-dot-tick/macos-sandbox/bubblewrap, generated sandbox profiles or bwrap invocation where available, readonly fallback, and attempt evidence recording of active sandbox mode.
acceptance_criteria: Child attempts to directly write .tick/issues/*.json fail under supported sandbox; readonly fallback removes write bits from .tick; active sandbox mode appears in attempt evidence and supervisor output.
closed_reason: Added worktree .tick filesystem protection with sandbox mode resolution, readonly-dot-tick fallback that removes write bits recursively, and attempt evidence reporting of sandbox mode/runtime resources.
